overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character walks through a courtyard with monumental ram-headed sphinx statues, ascends and descends a grand staircase with red carpet, then explores a terrace overlooking a sacred lake lined with palm trees and stone columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with monumental ram statues

events.description: character turns toward the grand staircase and begins approaching the temple entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple courtyard, approaching the monumental staircase flanked by statues

notable_agents.action: temple priest standing near the statue base, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large stone statue with ram head and lion body, decorated with hieroglyphs on the base
massive stone entrance structure with sloping walls and Egyptian reliefs
tall date palm in a large decorative planter
rocky desert mountains visible in the background under blue sky
large black metal bowl on stand for ceremonial fires

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open temple courtyard with scattered flower petals on the stone pavement. A massive ram-headed sphinx statue dominates the center, while the grand temple pylon rises in the distance. Palm trees and desert mountains frame the scene as the character approaches the staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with red carpet leading through pylon entrance

events.description: character begins ascending the steep stone staircase with red carpet
character reaches the top of the stairs, pauses, and turns to descend

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand staircase with red carpet, passing between monumental seated statues, then descending back down

notable_agents.action: woman in white linen robes descending the stairs as the character ascends

entered.detail: crimson carpet runner laid down the center of the stone stairs
colossal dark stone statue of a seated pharaoh wearing the double crown
tall stone wall of the temple entrance with colorful hieroglyphic reliefs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase with a red carpet, passing between two colossal seated pharaoh statues flanking the pylon entrance. The stone walls bear colorful Egyptian reliefs. After reaching the top, the character turns and descends, passing an NPC in white robes coming down the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace with gardens overlooking sacred lake

events.description: character emerges onto the upper terrace with view of the sacred lake and colonnaded courtyard
character turns left to follow the terrace path alongside the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper terrace, passing palm trees and flower beds while approaching the sacred lake

entered.detail: calm reflective water body surrounded by columns and palm trees
tall cylindrical pillar with capital, part of the colonnade
rectangular planter with red and orange flowers
ruined temple structures visible across the lake

segments.scene_description: Having descended the stairs, the character walks along a sunlit terrace lined with palm trees and vibrant flower beds. The sacred lake opens up ahead, surrounded by ancient stone columns, with distant temple ruins visible across the water and mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: sacred lake colonnade with stone pillars and lily pads

events.description: character walks closer to the water's edge, passing between the stone columns

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the sacred lake, observing the lily pads on the water and passing between ancient stone columns

entered.detail: green lily pads floating on the surface of the sacred lake water
large metal bowl with flames burning atop a stone pedestal

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the edge of the sacred lake, passing between tall stone columns that cast long shadows on the pavement. Lily pads float on the calm water surface, and ceremonial braziers burn nearby. The scene is framed by distant mountains and the ruins of the ancient temple complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a monumental temple complex that transitions from a grand ceremonial courtyard to a serene lakeside terrace. It begins with the character walking across stone pavement scattered with flower petals toward a massive ram-headed sphinx and a distant temple pylon. As the character approaches the pylon, the camera ascends a red-carpeted grand staircase flanked by colossal pharaoh statues and colorful reliefs before turning to descend past a robed figure. The scene then opens onto a sunlit terrace lined with palm trees and vibrant flower beds, leading the way toward a sacred lake. Finally, the camera glides along the water's edge, passing between tall stone columns and burning braziers while lily pads float on the calm surface against a backdrop of distant mountains and ruins.
